title: Emergency Plumbing
desc: We provide fast and reliable emergency plumbing services across the GTA. Whether it’s a burst pipe, major leak, clogged drain, or water backup, our team responds quickly to minimize damage and restore your system. We diagnose the issue on-site and deliver practical, effective repairs to get your plumbing back to normal as soon as possible. Available for homes, condos, and commercial properties.

### Our Guarantees to Our Clients

At QuickFast, we stand behind our work and our team. With over 15 years of service, we are committed to delivering reliable workmanship, professional service, and dependable results for every home, condo, and business we serve.

![](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/824e75_4e5f6969f3644075a9c7a1ff52428da5~mv2.png/v1/fill/w_71,h_71,al_c,q_85,usm_0.66_1.00_0.01,enc_avif,quality_auto/824e75_4e5f6969f3644075a9c7a1ff52428da5~mv2.png)

​We Respect Your Property

Our technicians treat every property with care and professionalism. We work cleanly, protect your space during service, and ensure the job site is left tidy and damage-free.

​

Customer Satisfaction Guaranteed

Your satisfaction is our priority. If you are not satisfied with our service, workmanship, or professionalism, our team will work with you to make it right.

​

Fast & Reliable Service

We understand that repairs and maintenance are important for your home or business. Our team responds quickly and works efficiently to resolve issues and minimize disruption.

​

Quality Workmanship

We take pride in delivering high-quality installations, repairs, and maintenance services. Our experienced technicians ensure every job is completed to professional standards so your systems operate safely and efficiently.
